[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111111 7
1 00100001 2
2 10000100 2
3 11010101 5
4 00110001 3
5 11101100 5
6 10010110 4
7 10101001 4

67 76 11111111 a
